notes: I don't have the Steam version so idk if it should be Verified or not but when trying to play it using my GOG account and Heroic or Unifideck I couldn't get it to play. There would be a loading bar that would get half way and then it would go back to the play page.  Unifideck would say "Network Error UMU retrying 1/3" and then try to load the game 3 times but it didn't work.
title: Meganoid
